title: Place of hearing
doc_html:
§296.  Place of hearing

Hearings by the commissioner shall, at the discretion of the commissioner, be held either at the state capital or in the parish in which the licensed premises in question are located.  

Amended by Acts 1962, No. 246, §1; Acts 1987, No. 696, §1.
doc_text:
§296.  Place of hearing
Hearings by the commissioner shall, at the discretion of the commissioner, be held either at the state capital or in the parish in which the licensed premises in question are located.
Amended by Acts 1962, No. 246, §1; Acts 1987, No. 696, §1.
